# terrible_community_general_pnpm (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `alias` (String) Alias of the Node.js library.
- `dev` (Boolean) Install dependencies in development mode. Pnpm ignores any regular dependencies in `package.json`.
- `executable` (String) The executable location for pnpm. The default location it searches for is `PATH`, fails if not set.
- `global` (Boolean) Install the Node.js library globally.
- `ignore_scripts` (Boolean) Use the `--ignore-scripts` flag when installing.
- `name` (String) The name of a Node.js library to install. All packages in `package.json` are installed if not provided.
- `no_optional` (Boolean) Do not install optional packages, equivalent to `--no-optional`.
- `optional` (Boolean) Install dependencies in optional mode.
- `path` (String) The base path to install the Node.js libraries.
- `production` (Boolean) Install dependencies in production mode. Pnpm ignores any dependencies under `devDependencies` in package.json.
- `state` (String) Installation state of the named Node.js library. If `absent` is selected, a name option must be provided.
- `version` (String) The version of the library to be installed, in semver format.
